heading: Capitol complex E–85 refueling station
label: 2169 Capitol complex E–85 refueling station
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of this title

children.heading: Construction
children.label: a Construction
children.text: The Architect of the Capitol may construct a fuel tank and pumping system for E–85 fuel at or within close proximity to the Capitol Grounds Fuel Station.

children.heading: Use
children.label: b Use
children.text: The E–85 fuel tank and pumping system shall be available for use by all legislative branch vehicles capable of operating with E–85 fuel, subject to such other legislative branch agencies reimbursing the Architect of the Capitol for the costs of E–85 fuel used by such other legislative branch vehicles.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $640,000 for fiscal year 2008.
